name: Empereur Hirohito
longDesc: Empereur Hirohito est un général blindée de qualité or — Japon. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Leader
skills.desc: Dealt damage of commanded units against land units +X%. When capturing an enemy city, grant "commendation" to friendly units within 3 hexes and yourself, increasing attack of the unit by 15%, lasts for 3 turns

skills.name: Panzer Leader
skills.desc: X% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding armored units

skills.name: Battlefield Intuition
skills.desc: Commanded units ignore smoke bomb, phantom status, dodge effect, and EMCON. Dealt damage to enemy below half HP +X%

skills.name: Supply Organization
skills.desc: When commanding troops in your territory, economic, industry, and technology output +X%.

skills.name: Armored Assault
skills.desc: Deal +X% damage to the enemy when commanding armored units

sources: Données extraites de l'APK World Conqueror 4
